project.name: OBD2 Diagnostic Dashboard
project.status: POC — stable, ready for next feature phase

purpose: A real-time vehicle diagnostic dashboard that reads OBD2 sensor data, runs diagnostic rules against live frames, and surfaces alerts to the user. Currently uses a mock adapter; real hardware adapter is not yet built.

architecture.styling: SCSS with a shared _variables.scss design token file

core/models: ObdLiveFrame — snapshot of one OBD2 sensor reading
DiagnosticResult — output of a single rule evaluation
DiagnosticSession — full session with frames and results
GuidedTestResult — output of a guided test flow
core/adapters: ObdAdapter (interface) — hardware-agnostic contract: data$, connectionStatus$, connect(), disconnect(), sendCommand()
MockObdAdapterService — streams synthetic frames at 1fps, supports 5 fault modes: normal | lean | rich | vacuum-leak | warmup-issue
core/diagnostics: DiagnosticEngineService — 30-frame rolling buffer, runs all rules per frame, 3-frame persistence debounce before emitting alerts
Rules: LeanConditionRule, RichConditionRule, VacuumLeakPatternRule, WarmupIssueRule, BatteryHealthRule, IdleStabilityRule
features/dashboard: DashboardPageComponent — main live view: metric cards, 3 line charts, diagnostic alerts panel
Charts: RPM (0–4000), STFT B1 (±25%), LTFT B1 (±25%) — update every 2 frames, destroyed in ngOnDestroy via ViewChild
shared/components: MetricCardComponent — label, value (rounded via number pipe), unit
StatusBadgeComponent — exists but not yet wired

keyDecisions.noNgRx: All state via RxJS subjects directly in services
keyDecisions.diagnosticDebounce: A rule must fire for 3 consecutive frames before the alert is shown — prevents flicker
keyDecisions.chartThrottle: Charts update every 2nd frame (frameCount % 2) to reduce render pressure
keyDecisions.chartDestroy: All 3 chart instances destroyed explicitly via ViewChild refs in ngOnDestroy
keyDecisions.typeSafety: strict: true in tsconfig; connectionStatus$ is Observable<'disconnected'|'connecting'|'connected'|'error'>, not Observable<string>
keyDecisions.valuePipe: Metric values rounded in the template via Angular number pipe, not in the component
keyDecisions.mockOnly: No real hardware adapter exists yet — all data is synthetic

workflowRules.noPRs: Push all changes directly to main — never open a pull request unless explicitly asked
workflowRules.noInlineCSS: No inline styles or inline templates
workflowRules.noNewFeatures: Do not add features unless explicitly instructed
workflowRules.commitStyle: Conventional commits: feat:, fix:, refactor:, polish:

knownIssues: app.component.spec.ts:20 — pre-existing test error (Property 'title' does not exist on AppComponent), unrelated to dashboard work, do not touch
SCSS lighten() calls produce deprecation warnings (Dart Sass 3 migration) — not blocking
nextPhaseCandidates: Vehicle profile form (make, model, year, engine)
Session recording and session summary view
Real hardware adapter (Web Serial API / ELM327)
